sw omar, elier is not at the shop today so i asked him questions he probably might know that i wanted to ask elier. i asked what got him to start using ep after having his account for so long and he had not used it, he said 2 people came that needed expensive repairs and he offered ep and was able to close the sale. elier usually works with people he knows, so they tend to pay it in full or pay him little by little because they are his friends/family. since he did not know the people for the big repairs he just offered ep.

Full Comments:
Checked in via Maps Application 
Spoke with Jeremy, this was a quicker visit because he had multiple customers in the office and was working the front by himself. Asked about the business since he's taken over the shop and said things are going well for the shop and they are staying busy, then asked about EasyPay and he said the declines last month killed him with sales because all of his customers that applied got declined 0 for 5. I apologized and said I would update corporate on the declines and to please ring me if that continues. From here, did some light education and training on the NBC, dropped off pens, pads along with my information as the best POC when needed.
